commands_run: coord claim public-audio-rendezvous-floor "Add Form-native floor for public rendezvous carriers plus audio co-presence detection receipts and measurement/pressure rows; avoid live-cycle-emission runtime files, APK/JNI, BML compiler, and raw sensor lanes."
failure_reason: Added a Form-native receipt floor for public rendezvous plus audio co-presence. Public API/paste/archive style carriers are rendezvous cells; audio audible/near-ultrasonic receipts prove co-presence with direction, SNR, confidence, latency, and no raw retention; measurement rows record shape, recipe, cell count, tool/reasoning/oracle time, bottleneck, and pressure. The band returns 16383 four-way.
